title: Sniffer's delicacies
description: Embark on a gastronomic tour of the ancient cuisine, which was revived together with Sniffer!
body:
_Embark on a gastronomic journey through the ancient cuisine that has been revived with Sniffer!_

Now you have two paths: vegetarian and Meateater (~~or be omnivorous~~).

_Vegetarian's way_ you get products that are produced by the Sniffer and cook from this dish without harming the Sniffer .

_Meateater's way_ you will be able to use the Sniffer as livestock and cook hearty dishes from its meat.

**The choice is always yours .**

In any case, delicacies according to ancient recipes are waiting for you!

With this mod, no one will say that the Sniffer is useless, no matter which path you choose,

because in addition to food, the Sniffer can provide you with a new type of wood.

_Don't miss this opportunity!_

![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/68655356623555bc8157a77415c6cda3a82717e6.png)
